name: read_noc_solution
short_description: Read NOC solution from JSON file
full_help:
read_noc_solution

Description: 
Read NOC solution from JSON file

Syntax: 
read_noc_solution  -file <arg> [-no_update <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  -file         Input NOC solution file In JSON format
  [-no_update]  Do not run NoC compiler after reading in NoC solution
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
NOC

arguments.description: Input NOC solution file In JSON format
